text:

POLYMARKET HIVE WORLD CUP STARTING TODAY

Last chance to join!

https://t.co/ItsWgJLiSA https://t.co/yEPsdmfI4R

I'm ready for the SpaceX IPO tomorrow! 🚀

Vibes are telling me this is a great bet as literally everyone is rightfully saying this company is massively overvalued; let's see what happens! https://t.co/UA23bwk3Vs

Amended SpaceX S-1 was just published

Seems like the 'reference fully diluted share count' was off by 10%, Hyperliquid longs basically overpaid by 10%

Expected IPO price is $135/share

$SPCX https://t.co/8SUcw4nBYe

Didn't participate last time but definitely joining this time!

Exciting!
Other platforms are now creating markets on whether Polymarket will refund 💀💀💀 https://t.co/HZbKnZegAL

Polymarket taker rebates are launching today!

Still seeing a lot of confusion/misinformation, so a reminder:

wV is fee-normalized!!! (= ~33x the base fee)

Entry price and category are only part of the wV formula to normalize the variable fee rate

https://t.co/mHAnMZdgn7

Lost a couple thousand dollars betting against AdorableRaccoon last year

After the Google Year in Search was revealed, it was obvious he insider traded this market as every single one of his 'predictions' ended up being correct

Definitely surprised to see he's been caught!

https://t.co/TGNwhl45EX
Trump is a prediction market enjoyer https://t.co/Bb5gdZnGGw
Feeling incredibly average today

I must say I'm quite disappointed with Hyperliquid's 'outcome markets' launch

The UI is simply does not suit these markets; and for some reason they launched without MMs -> no liquidity

I just can't imagine anyone wanting to bet on the World Cup on HyperLiquid with this UI? https://t.co/DE8CPaX057

I must say that Polymarket Twitter once again feels truly awful right now

The vast majority of people are shilling Polymarket with low-effort posts in the hopes of eventually receiving an airdrop

My timeline is just slop slop slop

It feels like a boring dystopia

There appears to be 20k in LP rewards on a market that has already ended

Millions of shares in the order book as everyone is trying to farm this

Seems like very inefficient way of deploying LP rewards 😅 https://t.co/0fxa8vDLVu

The expected cost to reach each Polymarket rebate tier:

153.9k — that's how much it costs monthly to reach the Obsidian 50% rebate tier

It's a bit much? I expect only a few people to reach Gold (18% rebate) or higher 😅

https://t.co/mHAnMZdgn7 https://t.co/ECkayc8exG

Twitter has been full of speculation about the upcoming Polymarket airdrop!

I wrote a comprehensive thread with some history and why I think the airdrop might actually be further away than many expect https://t.co/8o7dHKKl9O

Michael Saylor might have just quietly announced his Bitcoin sale

From the 8-K filing: 'Strategy expects to fund the Repurchases with available cash reserves, proceeds from sales of securities under its at-the-market offering program, and/or proceeds from the sale of bitcoin.'

There is now a 77% chance MicroStrategy announces a bitcoin sale this month

Just became number one on the leaderboard in less than 10 minutes

7 trades and 100% winrate

I firmly believe prop firms don't work on prediction markets. This is not the stock market, liquidity is thin and the spread is big https://t.co/LqWeYhpYGQ

Careful of projects like these

It's not a prop firm, they're just trying to get you to pay to pay a fee so you can do their fake prop firm challenge

Their top user is currently up 34 million in 1 day😂 https://t.co/bP104oxdRP

Seriously, what is going on with Polymarket?

A market that is doing millions in volume suddenly disappears, all trading is halted with no warning. An hour later, the team finally lets us know there's a technical issue with the market (how even?). 

Just like that, people trading this market were unexpectedly forced to hold their position with no way out.

On top of that, the rules and resolution process of geopolitical markets are simply not good. The resolution here does feel correct but the rules could've anticipated such an edge case better. 

It's just disappointing that random issues keep on happening...
